text: Upon entering this space, I feel a curious anticipation, as if I am crossing a threshold between the familiar outer world and an inner realm dedicated to thought and exploration. The glass doors and visible fire extinguisher suggest order, safety, and perhaps a hint of sterility. Yet, beyond them lies the invitation of ideas: a bright, colorful display devoted to R+D — research and development. I am invigorated by the sense that knowledge is being constructed here, that creativity and logic meet to shape our collective future. I am both observer and participant, aware of the generative tension between containment and innovation that such a space embodies.
